items.title: Stage Timer
items.description: A clean, distraction-free countdown clock for speakers, moderators, and live events. Fullscreen display, color-coded phases, multiple saved timers, and runs in the background — free forever, no ads.

items.title: Lettere Morali da Seneca Newsletter
items.description: Una newsletter che ogni lunedì ti manda una lettera di Seneca tradotta dal latino con l'AI, in calce viene anche generata una spiegazione semplice dei concetti dell'epistola.

items.title: RemoteTogether.io
items.description: RemoteTogether.io helps remote workers connect and co-work in real life. Work from cafés, coworking spaces, or pop-up offices, meet people and feel inspired.

items.title: WebNFCVcard
items.description: 📇 WebNFCVCard – A web-based tool to write and share vCards via NFC, making contact exchange seamless at events!

items.title: Smart Baby Sleep Led Bar Light
items.description: A smart baby sleep LED bar light customizable via BLE, with Arduino firmware and a companion Android app.

items.title: Android POC: Retrieve the contacts list via SMS from any phone.
items.description: POC Android application that enables users to remotely retrieve contact information from their own device via SMS.

items.title: Fixed rotation image, an Android sensors experiment
items.description: How to utilize Android's accelerometer data to stabilize on-screen images, regardless of device orientation.
